_comment: PATH A: OpenClaw + FREE google.colab.ai (Gemini) via an OpenAI-compatible shim, on a CPU Colab instance. No GPU, no model download, no API fee. TRADE-OFF: inference runs on Google's backend, so prompts leave the sandbox (fee-free but NOT contained — unlike the llama.cpp/vllm backends). Models from ai.list_models(): google/gemini-2.5-flash | gemini-2.5-pro | gemini-2.0-flash, google/gemma-3-{1b,4b,12b,27b}. (No gemini-3.5 exists.) Run with: bash bin/colab_openclaw_diffusiongemma.sh --gpu CPU --config configs/colab_ai_gemini.json --task examples/prompt_task.json
